pr.title: feat: vendor-agnostic analytics layer
pr.body:
Adds a thin analytics abstraction so funnel events are measurable the moment GA4 or Facebook Pixel scripts are loaded — silent no-op otherwise.

- `src/lib/analytics.ts` exports `trackEvent(eventName, params?)` which fans out to `gtag("event", …)` and `fbq("trackCustom", …)` when present

```ts
import { trackEvent } from "@/lib/analytics";
trackEvent("quiz_completed", { result: "playa" });
```

No new dependencies. Zero network/errors when no provider is configured.
pr.author: Copilot
